metadata.note: AWS operates under a shared responsibility model. AWS signs a BAA covering in-scope HIPAA-eligible services.

checks.name: MFA Enabled for Root Account
checks.description: Ensure MFA is enabled on the AWS root account to prevent unauthorized access to PHI environments
checks.remediation: Enable hardware or virtual MFA on the root account immediately

checks.name: MFA Enabled for All IAM Users
checks.description: Require MFA for all IAM users with console access to systems that process PHI
checks.remediation: Enforce MFA via IAM policy condition or AWS Organizations SCP

checks.name: Unique IAM User Accounts
checks.description: Ensure each individual has a unique IAM user; no shared credentials
checks.remediation: Audit and eliminate shared IAM accounts; assign individual accounts

checks.name: Automatic Logoff / Session Timeout
checks.description: Enforce session timeout policies for AWS console and application sessions accessing PHI
checks.remediation: Configure IAM role session durations and application-level idle timeouts

checks.name: IAM Access Keys Rotated Every 90 Days
checks.description: Ensure IAM access keys are rotated at least every 90 days
checks.remediation: Rotate access keys and enforce via AWS Config rule

checks.name: IAM Least Privilege
checks.description: Grant only the minimum permissions necessary to access PHI systems
checks.remediation: Use IAM Access Analyzer to identify overly permissive policies and tighten them

checks.name: No Unused IAM Credentials
checks.description: Disable IAM credentials unused for more than 90 days
checks.remediation: Review IAM credential report and disable or delete unused credentials

checks.name: S3 Buckets Storing PHI Are Not Publicly Accessible
checks.description: Block all public access to S3 buckets containing PHI
checks.remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access at both account and bucket level

checks.name: S3 Bucket Server-Side Encryption
checks.description: Ensure all S3 buckets storing PHI use server-side encryption (SSE-KMS preferred)
checks.remediation: Enable SSE-KMS with a CMK on all PHI buckets

checks.name: S3 Bucket Versioning and Backup
checks.description: Enable versioning on S3 buckets to protect PHI from accidental deletion
checks.remediation: Enable S3 versioning and configure lifecycle policies for retention

checks.name: S3 Access Logging Enabled
checks.description: Enable S3 server access logging for all buckets containing PHI
checks.remediation: Enable S3 server access logging or CloudTrail S3 data events

checks.name: S3 Bucket SSL-Only Access
checks.description: Deny HTTP (non-SSL) access to S3 buckets containing PHI
checks.remediation: Add a bucket policy that denies s3:* when aws:SecureTransport is false

checks.name: EBS Volumes Encrypted
checks.description: Ensure all EBS volumes storing or processing PHI are encrypted at rest
checks.remediation: Enable EBS default encryption at the AWS account level

checks.name: Security Groups Restrict Inbound Access
checks.description: Ensure no security group allows unrestricted inbound access (0.0.0.0/0) on sensitive ports
checks.remediation: Restrict security group rules to known IP ranges and required ports only

checks.name: EC2 Instances Regularly Patched
checks.description: Ensure EC2 instances running PHI workloads are regularly patched
checks.remediation: Use AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager with a compliant patch baseline

checks.name: EC2 IMDSv2 Enforced
checks.description: Require IMDSv2 on all EC2 instances to mitigate SSRF risk
checks.remediation: Set HttpTokens to 'required' on all EC2 instance metadata configurations

checks.name: No PHI on Public-Facing EC2 Instances
checks.description: PHI must not be stored or processed on publicly accessible EC2 instances
checks.remediation: Move PHI workloads to private subnets behind a load balancer or VPN

checks.name: RDS Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Ensure all RDS instances storing PHI are encrypted at rest using KMS
checks.remediation: Enable encryption at RDS instance creation; use snapshot + restore for existing instances

checks.name: RDS Not Publicly Accessible
checks.description: Ensure RDS instances containing PHI are not publicly accessible
checks.remediation: Set PubliclyAccessible to false and deploy in private subnets

checks.name: RDS Automated Backups Enabled
checks.description: Enable automated backups with a retention period of at least 7 days for PHI databases
checks.remediation: Set backup retention to 7+ days on all RDS instances storing PHI

checks.name: RDS Multi-AZ for High Availability
checks.description: Enable Multi-AZ for production RDS instances to ensure availability of PHI
checks.remediation: Enable Multi-AZ on production RDS instances

checks.name: RDS Deletion Protection Enabled
checks.description: Enable deletion protection on RDS instances storing PHI
checks.remediation: Enable DeletionProtection on all PHI RDS instances

checks.name: CloudTrail Enabled in All Regions
checks.description: Enable CloudTrail across all AWS regions to audit all API calls involving PHI
checks.remediation: Create a multi-region CloudTrail trail with management and data events

checks.name: CloudTrail Log File Integrity Validation
checks.description: Enable log file validation to detect tampering of audit logs
checks.remediation: Enable log file validation on all CloudTrail trails

checks.name: CloudTrail Logs Encrypted with KMS
checks.description: Encrypt CloudTrail logs at rest using a KMS CMK
checks.remediation: Configure CloudTrail to encrypt logs using a KMS CMK

checks.name: S3 Data Events Logged in CloudTrail
checks.description: Enable CloudTrail data events for S3 buckets storing PHI
checks.remediation: Enable S3 data events in CloudTrail for PHI buckets

checks.name: KMS CMK Used for PHI Encryption
checks.description: Use AWS KMS customer-managed keys (CMKs) for encrypting PHI at rest
checks.remediation: Create and use CMKs in KMS for all PHI data stores (S3, RDS, EBS, etc.)

checks.name: KMS Key Rotation Enabled
checks.description: Enable automatic annual rotation for all KMS CMKs used to encrypt PHI
checks.remediation: Enable automatic key rotation on all PHI-related KMS CMKs

checks.name: KMS Key Access Restricted
checks.description: Restrict KMS key usage to authorized principals only; no wildcard access
checks.remediation: Audit and tighten KMS key policies to specific IAM roles and users

checks.name: VPC Flow Logs Enabled
checks.description: Enable VPC Flow Logs to monitor network traffic in PHI environments
checks.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs for all VPCs and send to CloudWatch Logs or S3

checks.name: PHI Systems in Private Subnets
checks.description: Ensure all resources processing PHI are deployed in private subnets
checks.remediation: Review subnet placement for PHI workloads; move to private subnets

checks.name: TLS Enforced for Data in Transit
checks.description: Ensure all PHI transmitted over networks uses TLS 1.2 or higher
checks.remediation: Enforce TLS on all load balancers, APIs, and application endpoints; disable TLS 1.0/1.1

checks.name: No Unencrypted Data Transfers via Public Internet
checks.description: PHI must not traverse the public internet unencrypted; use VPN or AWS Direct Connect
checks.remediation: Use AWS VPN, Direct Connect, or VPC peering for inter-system PHI transfers

checks.name: GuardDuty Enabled in All Regions
checks.description: Enable GuardDuty for continuous threat detection in PHI environments
checks.remediation: Enable GuardDuty in all active regions and configure SNS alerting

checks.name: AWS Security Hub HIPAA Standard Enabled
checks.description: Enable the AWS Foundational Security Best Practices standard in Security Hub
checks.remediation: Enable Security Hub and activate the HIPAA-aligned security standard

checks.name: AWS Backup Enabled for PHI Resources
checks.description: Use AWS Backup to centrally manage and automate backups of all PHI data stores
checks.remediation: Create an AWS Backup plan covering RDS, DynamoDB, EBS, EFS, and S3

checks.name: Backup Encryption Enabled
checks.description: Ensure all AWS Backup vaults and backups of PHI are encrypted with KMS
checks.remediation: Configure AWS Backup vault with a KMS CMK

checks.name: Backup Restore Tested Annually
checks.description: Test restoration of PHI backups at least once per year
checks.remediation: Document and execute annual restore tests; record results

checks.name: AWS Config Enabled in All Regions
checks.description: Enable AWS Config to track configuration changes to PHI-related resources
checks.remediation: Enable AWS Config with a delivery channel in all active regions

checks.name: Risk Analysis Performed
checks.description: Conduct a thorough and accurate risk analysis of potential risks to PHI confidentiality, integrity, and availability

checks.name: Risk Management Plan
checks.description: Implement security measures to reduce identified risks to PHI to an acceptable level

checks.name: Sanction Policy for HIPAA Violations
checks.description: Apply appropriate sanctions to workforce members who fail to comply with HIPAA security policies

checks.name: Information System Activity Review
checks.description: Regularly review audit logs, access reports, and security incident tracking reports

checks.name: Workforce Clearance / Authorization Procedures
checks.description: Ensure only authorized workforce members have access to PHI

checks.name: Access Termination Procedures
checks.description: Immediately terminate PHI access upon workforce member termination or role change

checks.name: HIPAA Security Awareness Training
checks.description: Provide HIPAA security awareness training to all workforce members upon hire and annually

checks.name: Malicious Software Protection Training
checks.description: Train workforce on how to guard against malicious software

checks.name: Password Management Training
checks.description: Train workforce on creating, maintaining, and protecting passwords

checks.name: Access Authorization Policy
checks.description: Policies and procedures for granting access to PHI are documented and followed

checks.name: Minimum Necessary Access
checks.description: Workforce members access only the minimum PHI necessary to perform their job functions

checks.name: Quarterly Access Reviews
checks.description: Conduct quarterly reviews of user access to PHI systems

checks.name: Data Backup Plan
checks.description: Maintain a documented data backup plan for all PHI

checks.name: Disaster Recovery Plan
checks.description: Maintain a disaster recovery plan with defined RTO and RPO for PHI systems

checks.name: Emergency Mode Operation Plan
checks.description: Maintain procedures to enable continued PHI access during an emergency

checks.name: Annual Contingency Plan Testing
checks.description: Test the contingency plan at least annually and revise as needed

checks.name: Incident Response Policy
checks.description: Maintain documented procedures to identify, respond to, mitigate, and document security incidents

checks.name: Breach Notification Procedures
checks.description: Maintain procedures for identifying and notifying affected individuals, HHS, and media (if required) within HIPAA deadlines

checks.name: Facility Access Controls
checks.description: Limit physical access to systems that process PHI to authorized personnel only

checks.name: Workstation Use Policy
checks.description: Establish policies governing proper use of workstations that access PHI

checks.name: Workstation Security
checks.description: Implement physical safeguards for workstations that access PHI

checks.name: Device and Media Controls
checks.description: Manage movement and disposal of hardware and electronic media containing PHI

checks.name: AWS Data Center Physical Security
checks.description: Verify AWS data center physical security controls via AWS SOC 2 / ISO 27001 reports

checks.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA) with AWS
checks.description: Execute a signed BAA with AWS before using HIPAA-eligible services to store or process PHI
evidence: List of HIPAA-eligible AWS services in use

checks.name: BAAs with All Business Associates
checks.description: Execute BAAs with all vendors and subcontractors who access or handle PHI

checks.name: HIPAA Privacy Officer Designated
checks.description: Designate a Privacy Officer responsible for HIPAA compliance

checks.name: HIPAA Security Officer Designated
checks.description: Designate a Security Officer responsible for HIPAA security policies and procedures

checks.name: HIPAA Security Policies Documented
checks.description: Maintain written security policies and procedures for all required and addressable HIPAA standards

checks.name: Documentation Retained for 6 Years
checks.description: Retain HIPAA-related policies, procedures, and records for at least 6 years

checks.name: Policies Reviewed and Updated Periodically
checks.description: Review and update HIPAA security documentation in response to environmental or operational changes

checks.name: PHI Data Inventory / Data Flow Map
checks.description: Maintain a complete inventory of where PHI is stored, processed, and transmitted

checks.name: PHI De-identification Procedures
checks.description: Use de-identification or pseudonymization for PHI in non-production environments

checks.name: Notice of Privacy Practices (NPP)
checks.description: Provide patients with a Notice of Privacy Practices describing how their PHI is used

checks.name: Minimum Necessary Standard for PHI Disclosure
checks.description: Disclose only the minimum necessary PHI for any given purpose

checks.name: Patient Rights Procedures
checks.description: Maintain procedures for patients to access, amend, and request restrictions on their PHI
